description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines hidden jobs (templates) for CI token handling. Define a .common-ci-tokens job that extends the .tokens-for-all-branches template. The .tokens-for-all-branches template itself extends four other hidden jobs: .id-tokens, .delivery-metrics-token, .grafana-api-key, and .chef-api-private-key. No stages, images, scripts, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified; these templates are intended solely for inheritance of token variables.
